title: Compliance — Regulatory Compliance Assessment
description: Regulatory compliance assessment tools: evaluate systems against ICH/FDA frameworks, browse ICH control catalogs, and check SAM.gov entity exclusions. Pure Rust via nexcore-compliance.

tools.name: assess
tools.description: Run a compliance assessment against a set of controls. Provide system name and array of controls with id, title, status (implemented/partial/not_implemented/not_applicable), and catalog. Returns findings with severity and overall result.

parameters.name: system_name
parameters.description: Name of the system being assessed

parameters.name: controls
parameters.description: Array of control objects: {id, title, status, catalog}

tools.name: catalog-ich
tools.description: List ICH pharmacovigilance and clinical trial controls (E2A-E2F, E6, E8, E9, M1). Reference catalog for compliance assessments.

tools.name: check-exclusion
tools.description: Check SAM.gov for entity exclusions (debarment, suspension). Returns guidance for manual lookup when API key is not configured.
